description: A vintage-style illustrated travel poster showing a stylized London skyline at sunset with the Ferris-wheel observation wheel, the clock tower, Parliament buildings and a river crossed by bridges in orange and purple tones. Cursive text near the bottom reads Cross the pond to, with the large word ENGLAND below it and a smaller line reading for FREE! A line at the very bottom reads DHS.GOV/CBPHOME.
notable_text: Cross the pond to ENGLAND for FREE!; DHS.GOV/CBPHOME
